reason: VRF-05 requires the /api/vitals RUM sink endpoint to be live on the public production URL. Phase 58 CIB-05 added this route in code but the current public prod deployment (https://signalframeux.vercel.app, age 15d, deploy id dpl_FJGbMAJokFtuoSYj2smEsStjDEWo) predates that work. POST to /api/vitals returns HTTP 404 at the public alias; the deployment-specific URL is protection-gated (HTTP 401). Even a fresh deploy alone is insufficient — Hobby tier 1h log retention requires the synthetic-seed → aggregate cycle to complete inside a single 1h window, which means a deliberate close-out session with: (1) fresh prod deploy from current branch (or main once merged), (2) immediate playwright synthetic-seed run, (3) immediate vercel logs aggregation, (4) verdict capture. None of those steps are appropriate to take autonomously inside this verification pass.

evidence.aggregator_branch_scope_finding: vercel logs CLI scopes by current git branch (chore/v1.7-ratification has no production deploys); aggregator script must either accept --deployment-url or be invoked from the branch that the prod deploy was built from

thresholds.notes: Plan 03 W1a contract preserved verbatim; thresholds re-applied on v1.9 follow-up.

v1_9_unblock_recipe: 1. Merge chore/v1.7-ratification (or successor) to main; trigger fresh Vercel prod deploy that includes app/api/vitals/route.ts.
2. Confirm: curl -X POST https://signalframeux.vercel.app/api/vitals -H content-type:application/json -d {valid-payload} returns HTTP 200 (not 404).
3. Run scripts/v1.8-rum-seed-runner.mjs (or v1.9 successor) within the deploy_window for >=100 LCP samples.

4. Within the same 1h log-retention window: SINCE=70m pnpm tsx scripts/v1.8-rum-aggregate.ts (the aggregator script accepts --since override; consider extending it to accept --deployment-url for branch-scoped log queries).
6. Optional: schedule a recurring synthetic-seed cron via Vercel Cron + a beacon-emitting endpoint to keep RUM samples flowing without manual seeder runs.
